BEGIN PHYLONET;
InferNetwork_ML (gt1,gt2,gt3,gt4,gt5,gt6,gt7,gt8,gt9,gt10,gt11,gt12,gt13,gt14,gt15,gt16,gt17,gt18,gt19,gt20,gt21,gt22,gt23,gt24,gt25,gt26,gt27,gt28,gt29,gt30,gt31,gt32,gt33,gt34,gt35,gt36,gt37,gt38,gt39,gt40,gt41,gt42,gt43,gt44,gt45,gt46,gt47,gt48,gt49,gt50,gt51,gt52,gt53,gt54,gt55,gt56,gt57,gt58,gt59,gt60,gt61,gt62,gt63,gt64,gt65,gt66,gt67,gt68,gt69,gt70,gt71,gt72,gt73,gt74,gt75,gt76,gt77,gt78,gt79,gt80,gt81,gt82,gt83,gt84,gt85,gt86,gt87,gt88,gt89,gt90,gt91,gt92,gt93,gt94,gt95,gt96,gt97,gt98,gt99,gt100,gt101,gt102,gt103,gt104,gt105,gt106,gt107,gt108,gt109,gt110,gt111,gt112,gt113,gt114,gt115,gt116,gt117,gt118,gt119,gt120,gt121,gt122,gt123,gt124,gt125,gt126,gt127,gt128,gt129,gt130,gt131,gt132,gt133,gt134,gt135,gt136,gt137,gt138,gt139,gt140,gt141,gt142,gt143,gt144,gt145,gt146,gt147,gt148,gt149,gt150,gt151,gt152,gt153,gt154,gt155,gt156,gt157,gt158,gt159,gt160,gt161,gt162,gt163,gt164,gt165,gt166,gt167,gt168,gt169,gt170,gt171,gt172,gt173,gt174,gt175,gt176,gt177,gt178,gt179,gt180,gt181,gt182,gt183,gt184,gt185,gt186,gt187,gt188,gt189,gt190,gt191,gt192,gt193,gt194,gt195,gt196,gt197,gt198,gt199,gt200,gt201,gt202,gt203,gt204,gt205,gt206,gt207,gt208) XXX -x 10 -n 10 -pl 6 -di -a < bienne:D10_nuclear,D13_nuclear; hirsutum:HNCF_nuclear; narbonense:D07_nuclear; grandiflorum:C96_nuclear; decumbens:D03_nuclear> -s speciesStart;

#replace XXX with number of nodes you want to test
#add "-h {bienne}" just after after "-s speciesStart" to run analysis making L. bienne as explicit hybrid node
